name: Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V. (Volaris)
description: Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V., operating as Volaris, is a Mexican ultra-low-cost carrier that provides air transportation services for passengers, cargo, and mail. Based in Mexico City, the airline operates an extensive network of domestic and international routes across Mexico, the United States, Central, and South America. As Mexico's largest airline by passenger volume, Volaris focuses on offering low-fare tickets, quality customer service, and a diverse range of travel products to its customers, maintaining a leading position in the competitive Mexican aviation market.
name_verified: Controladora Vuela Compañía de Aviación, S.A.B. de C.V.
